Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given a process tree model that is underfitting The model is intended to represent the Order to Cash process but lacks necessary constraints

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The intended logical flow 1 Receive Order 2 Check Inventory 3 If inventory sufficient Authorize Payment Package Items Ship Order then Close Order 4 If inventory insufficient Cancel Order then Close Order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The root is a sequence of four children 1 receive order 2 check inventory 3 xor node 4 close order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The xor node has two options XOR choice a successful subtree which is a parallel AND of authorize payment package items and ship order b cancel subtree which is a sequence of cancel order followed by close order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: But note the close order is placed at the root level meaning it is after the xor node

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: One issue is that in the successful branch the three activities are in parallel This means that the model allows for example ship order to occur before authorize payment

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: That might be problematic because we should not ship the order before payment is authorized

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: In the cancel branch we have a sequence of cancel order and close order from the cancel subtree and then the roots close order That would be two close orders

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the trace would have two close order activities That is not acceptable

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Trace Receive Order Check Inventory Cancel Order Close Order Close Order

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This trace is generated by the model because It starts with receive order Then check inventory Then the XOR branch we choose the cancel subtree which is a sequence of cancel order and close order Then the roots close order

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In reality we should only have one close order at the end Having two is incorrect

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Alternatively we can also consider the successful branch with an incorrect order but the cancel branch issue is more severe because it duplicates an activity

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The trace with two close orders is accepted and is not acceptable
